Localization.Description: The list of permissions in the security configurator was changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: "{object.value}" was allowed for role "{object.name}" in application {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
"{object.value}" was allowed for user {object.account.name} in application {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
"{object.value}" was denied for user group "{object.name}" in application {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
"{object.value}" was denied for role "{object.name}" in application {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
"{object.value}" was denied for user {object.account.name} in application {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
"{object.value}" was allowed for user group "{object.name}" in application {datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
